name: copilot-speaketh
description: Reads GitHub Copilot Chat replies aloud automatically, cross-platform (macOS + Windows).

commands.title: Copilot Speaketh: Speak the last reply now

copilotSpeaketh.enabled.description: Automatically read new Copilot Chat replies aloud.

copilotSpeaketh.voice.description: Voice name. macOS examples: Moira (Irish), Samantha. Windows examples: Microsoft Hazel Desktop. Leave blank for the system default.

copilotSpeaketh.rate.description: Speaking rate. macOS: words-per-minute offset added to ~175 (e.g. 40 = faster). Windows SAPI: -10..10.

copilotSpeaketh.maxChars.description: Maximum characters to read per reply. 0 = read the entire reply.

copilotSpeaketh.skipCodeBlocks.description: Skip fenced code blocks when reading (reading code aloud is usually noise).

copilotSpeaketh.readThinking.description: Also read Copilot's 'thinking' reasoning blocks (off by default).
